schedule.title: Venue Inspection
schedule.description: Final walk-through of the venue to confirm all arrangements.

schedule.title: Rehearsal Ceremony
schedule.description: Full rehearsal of the ceremony with key wedding party members.

schedule.title: Venue Decoration Setup
schedule.description: Decoration team sets up the venue with floral arrangements and table settings.

schedule.title: Guest Arrival
schedule.description: Guests begin arriving. MC greets guests and guides them to seats.

schedule.title: Wedding Ceremony
schedule.description: The main wedding ceremony takes place.

schedule.title: Reception Dinner
schedule.description: Dinner reception begins with the catering team serving all courses.

schedule.title: Photo Album Review
schedule.description: Photographer presents initial photos from the wedding for couple review.
